name: Obex
description: The Obex system multiplies the kinetic energy of a Tenno's kicks and punches, delivering devastating blows to any target.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.description: The Obex system multiplies the kinetic energy of a Tenno's kicks and punches, delivering devastating blows to any target.

Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tecton Sparring Skin not applying properly to the Prisma Obex.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some positioning of weapon trails on sparring weapons (Obex, Kogake, Hirudo, etc).

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the weapon Energy trail for the Obex and Prima Obex incorrectly showing as claw-like.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.3+20.4.3.1
patchlogs.changes:
The Prisma Obex is now tradable!
Slightly reduced the damage of the Prisma Obex in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed positioning of the Kogake and Obex to be symmetrical.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: The Obex, Dual Ether Daggers, Vaykor Hek and Ankyros series can now be used in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Shock Camo skin for the Obex not properly applying to offhand or feet attachments.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.5 + 16.4.5.1 + 16.4.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed positioning of melee decorations on the Obex and Kogake.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Obex energy color not appearing on ground slams.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.5.2 + 13.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Obex not playing the correct animations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with lingering FX on the Obex.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Tuned conclave values for Brakk, Machete Wraith, and Obex
